name: add_dashboard_tab
description:
Add a new tab to an existing dashboard.

Use get_dashboard first to get the pageLayoutId and see existing tabs.
After creating a tab, use add_dashboard_widget with the returned tab ID to add widgets.

pageLayoutId.description: The page layout UUID of the dashboard (from get_dashboard result)

position.description: Tab position (0-based). Defaults to after the last existing tab.
